title: galium albicans
intro: Galium albicans, also known as White Bedstraw or White Cleavers, is a perennial herb belonging to the bedstraw family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Galium albicans include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Galium albicans can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost overall well-being.
